title: Enforce unique task lifecycle state across .aof/tasks
description: Ensure a task ID can exist in only one lifecycle directory at a time, and prevent alignment-pulse or other triage paths from implicitly re-opening tasks that were already moved to done, archived, or retired.
triage_notes: Completed in v2.3 runtime integrity hardening: task updates now consolidate duplicate lifecycle copies and organization-audit explicitly fails when historical duplicate task ids remain.
